name: Soccer
description: The world's most popular sport, developing teamwork, fitness, and tactical awareness in players of all ages.
rules: Two teams of 11 players compete to score goals by getting the ball into the opposing team's net. Games consist of two 45-minute halves (modified for youth). No hands allowed except for the goalkeeper.

name: Netball
description: A fast-paced team sport emphasizing precision passing, positioning, and strategic play.
rules: 7 players per team, each restricted to specific zones. Players cannot move with the ball. Score by shooting through the opponent's ring. Four quarters of 15 minutes each.

name: Volleyball
description: A dynamic net sport that builds explosive power, coordination, and seamless team communication.
rules: 6 players per team. Rally to 25 points (win by 2). Best of 5 sets. Players rotate positions each time their team wins the serve.

name: Swimming
description: A complete full-body workout sport that builds strength, endurance, and breath control.
rules: Competitions include freestyle, backstroke, breaststroke, and butterfly strokes over various distances. Swimmers must touch walls at each turn and finish in their designated lane.

name: Tennis / Table Tennis
description: Precision racket sports that sharpen reflexes, focus, and strategic thinking.
rules: Tennis: played on a court with a net, players score through points (15, 30, 40, game). Table Tennis: fastest racket sport, played to 11 points on a table with a net.

name: Gymnastics
description: An artistic and athletic discipline that develops flexibility, strength, balance, and grace.
rules: Gymnasts perform routines on various apparatus (floor, vault, beam, bars). Judges score on difficulty, execution, and artistry. Modified rules for younger age groups.

name: Futsal
description: Fast-paced indoor soccer played on a small court that develops technical mastery and quick thinking.
rules: 5 players per team on a hard court. No walls in play. Smaller, heavier ball. Two 20-minute halves. Emphasis on close control and quick passing.

name: Athletics
description: Track and field events that build raw speed, endurance, explosive power, and competitive spirit.
rules: Covers sprints, middle and long-distance running, jumping events (high jump, long jump, triple jump), and throwing events (shot put, discus, javelin).

name: Basketball
description: High-energy court sport combining athleticism, strategy, and team coordination.
rules: 5 players per team. Score by shooting through the opponent's hoop. Four 10-minute quarters. Players dribble to move with the ball.

name: Rugby Sevens
description: A fast, intense version of rugby with 7 players per side that rewards speed, power, and skill.
rules: 7 players per team. Games are 14 minutes (two 7-minute halves). Score by grounding the ball over the try line (5 pts) or kicking conversions (2 pts).

name: Dancing
description: Artistic movement discipline combining creativity, rhythm, fitness, and self-expression.
rules: Various styles including contemporary, hip-hop, afrobeats, and cultural dance. Performances are judged on technique, creativity, synchronization, and expression.
